conventional-investment.label: Conventional (investment)
conventional-investment.note: Fannie/Freddie investment-property loan. Hardest qualification — lender weighs personal DTI.

dscr.label: DSCR loan
dscr.note: No personal income or DTI check — qualified by property cash flow alone. Slightly higher rate.

second-home.label: Second home
second-home.note: Lowest down for non-primary. Property must be reasonable distance from primary residence and used as second home.

fha-primary.label: FHA (primary residence only)
fha-primary.note: Only viable if you live in the property. House-hack scenarios where you STR a portion of your primary.
